scenarios.description: children() on element with no child nodes returns empty Elements without initializing shadow cache
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); // childNodes is EmptyNodes

scenarios.description: children() on element with non-Element child only yields empty Elements after filtering
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendText("text"); // childNodes has one TextNode

scenarios.description: children() on element with exactly one Element child returns single-element Elements and caches list
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements contains the span child

scenarios.description: children() on element with mixed children returns only Element nodes preserving order
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendText("t1"); Element c1 = el.appendElement("p"); el.appendText("t2");
scenarios.expectedResult:
returned Elements contains only the

child at correct position
pseudocode: Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendText("t1"); Element c1 = el.appendElement("p"); el.appendText("t2");

scenarios.description: children() returns cached result on second call without rebuilding list
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendElement("span"); el.children(); // prime cache
scenarios.expectedResult: second call returns new Elements equal to first without error
pseudocode: Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendElement("span"); el.children();

scenarios.description: children() after modifying children invalidates cache and rebuilds on next call
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendElement("span"); el.children(); el.appendElement("b");
scenarios.expectedResult: after append, children() reflects both span and b
pseudocode: Element el = new Element("div"); Element c1 = el.appendElement("span"); el.children(); el.appendElement("b");
assert result.size() == 2; assert result.get(0) == c1; assert result.get(1).tagName().equals("b");
